html:
Exclusive to:
Chess Figures are Trinkets that can be obtained from digging up Graves, picking Tumbleweeds and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Stations after the Sketch of its figure is unlocked in the world.

Giving one of these trinkets to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the respective Chess Piece Figure.

When given to the Antlion as tribute, these trinkets delay its rage by 0.66 days.

Black Bishop

The Black Bishop can be obtained from digging up Graves, picking Tumbleweeds and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Station after the Sketch of Bishop Figure is unlocked in the world.

Giving a Black Bishop to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the Bishop Figure.

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.

The Black Bishop can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_16".

×4

Black Knight

The Black Knight can be obtained from digging up Graves, picking Tumbleweeds and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Station after the Sketch of Knight Figure is unlocked in the world.

Giving a Black Knight to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the Knight Figure.

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.

The Black Knight can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_31".

×4

Black Rook

The Black Rook can be obtained from digging up Graves, picking Tumbleweeds and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Station after the Sketch of Rook Figure is unlocked in the world.

Giving a Black Rook to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the Rook Figure.

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.

The Black Rook can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_29".

×4

White Bishop

The White Bishop can be obtained from digging up Graves, picking Tumbleweeds and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Station after the Sketch of Bishop Figure is unlocked in the world.

Giving a White Bishop to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the Bishop Figure.

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.

The White Bishop can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_15".

×4

White Knight

The White Knight can be obtained from digging up Graves, picking Tumbleweeds and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Station after the Sketch of Knight Figure is unlocked in the world.

Giving a White Knight to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the Knight Figure.

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.

The White Knight can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_30".

×4

White Rook

The White Rook can be obtained from digging up Graves, picking Tumbleweeds and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Station after the Sketch of Rook Figure is unlocked in the world.

Giving a White Rook to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the Rook Figure.

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.

The White Rook can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_28".

×4
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Chess Figures are Trinkets that can be obtained from digging up Graves, picking Tumbleweeds and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Stations after the Sketch of its figure is unlocked in the world.
Giving one of these trinkets to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the respective Chess Piece Figure.
When given to the Antlion as tribute, these trinkets delay its rage by 0.66 days.
Black Bishop[edit | edit source]
Black Bishop
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_16"
“...Maxwell left his stuff out again.”
–Wilson
“What is it with megalomaniacs and chess?”
–Willow
“Junk from braingame!”
–Wolfgang
“Winning with only one piece is hopeless.”
–Wendy
“IT'S REALLY BIG”
–WX-78
“The groove in this piece symbolizes the bishop's ceremonial headwear.”
–Wickerbottom
“And here I am just a pawn, eh?”
–Woodie
“Charlie was the only one who ever kept me in check.”
–Maxwell
“A nöble fighter.”
–Wigfrid
“We don't know how to play this game.”
–Webber
“What is your angle, mon ami?”
–Warly
“Can't play”
–Wormwood
“A bit highbrow, don'tcha think?”
–Winona
“A little piece from off the board.”
–Wortox
“Look like... tiny Ironfolk...?”
–Wurt
“I'm not really interested in board games.”
–Walter
“I have no patience for chess, but it looks simple enough.”
–Wanda
The Black Bishop can be obtained from digging up Graves, picking Tumbleweeds and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Station after the Sketch of Bishop Figure is unlocked in the world.
Giving a Black Bishop to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the Bishop Figure.
When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.
The Black Bishop can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_16".
×4
Black Knight[edit | edit source]
Black Knight
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_31"
“Honestly, he just leaves them out wherever.”
–Wilson
“Probably the most boring game ever invented.”
–Willow
“Junk from braingame!”
–Wolfgang
“I'd rather have the castle...”
–Wendy
“THE ONLY WINNING MOVE IS NOT TO PLAY”
–WX-78
“In German it is referred to as the "springer".”
–Wickerbottom
“That's the, uh, horse piece.”
–Woodie
“Not a pawn, but still a minion.”
–Maxwell
“Tis nöt a unicörn.”
–Wigfrid
“We can't follow the rules if we don't know them.”
–Webber
“It looks all knight to me.”
–Warly
“Little Neigher”
–Wormwood
“That's a knight.”
–Winona
“A little piece from off the board.”
–Wortox
“Look like... tiny Ironfolk...?”
–Wurt
“They're kind of boring once you've seen the bigger version.”
–Walter
“I wonder whatever happened to the rest of the set. Or the players.”
–Wanda
The Black Knight can be obtained from digging up Graves, picking Tumbleweeds and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Station after the Sketch of Knight Figure is unlocked in the world.
Giving a Black Knight to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the Knight Figure.
When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.
The Black Knight can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_31".
×4
Black Rook[edit | edit source]
Black Rook
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_29"
“How Machiavellian.”
–Wilson
“Chess is for pompous dorks.”
–Willow
“Junk from braingame!”
–Wolfgang
“A horse! A horse! My castle for a horse!”
–Wendy
“I AM TOO ADVANCED FOR HUMAN GAMES”
–WX-78
“Calling it a "castle" is plainly incorrect.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's, uh, the rook piece.”
–Woodie
“It is still beholden to the king.”
–Maxwell
“Even the feeble can wage mighty battle upön the böard.”
–Wigfrid
“Maybe Maxwell will teach us how to play.”
–Webber
“A little, tiny rook.”
–Warly
“Anyone to play with?”
–Wormwood
“That's a rook.”
–Winona
“A little piece from off the board.”
–Wortox
“This castle for ants?”
–Wurt
“I'm not really interested in board games.”
–Walter
“It seems like you can't walk too far around here without tripping over a chess piece.”
–Wanda
The Black Rook can be obtained from digging up Graves, picking Tumbleweeds and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Station after the Sketch of Rook Figure is unlocked in the world.
Giving a Black Rook to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the Rook Figure.
When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.
The Black Rook can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_29".
×4

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hình cờ vua là những Đồ trang sức có thể thu được bằng cách đào Mộ, nhặt Cỏ lăn và đóng búa vào các Trạm Giả khoa học Cổ đại sau khi Bản phác thảo của hình cờ đó được mở khóa trên thế giới.
title: Chess Figures
wikitext: {{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} Chess Figures are [[Trinkets]] that can be obtained from digging up [[Graves]], picking [[Tumbleweed]]s and hammering [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station]]s after the [[Sketch]] of its figure is unlocked in the world. Giving one of these trinkets to the [[Pig King]] will yield four [[Gold Nugget]]s and a [[Sketch]] for the respective [[Chess Pieces|Chess Piece Figure]]. When given to the [[Antlion]] as tribute, these trinkets delay its rage by 0.66 days. == [[File:Black Bishop.png|48px]] {{Anchor|Black Bishop|Black Bishop}} == {{Object Infobox |icon = Black Bishop.png |image = Black Bishop Dropped.png |name = Black Bishop |spawnCode = "trinket_16" |droppedBy = {{Pic|32|Ancient Pseudoscience Station Build}}{{Pic|32|Broken Pseudoscience Station Build}}{{Pic|32|Grave}}{{Pic|32|Tumbleweed}} |stack=40}} {{Quotes |wilson = ...Maxwell left his stuff out again. |willow = What is it with megalomaniacs and chess? |wolfgang = Junk from braingame! |wendy = Winning with only one piece is hopeless. |wx78 = IT'S REALLY BIG |wickerbottom = The groove in this piece symbolizes the bishop's ceremonial headwear. |woodie = And here I am just a pawn, eh? |maxwell = Charlie was the only one who ever kept me in check. |wigfrid = A nöble fighter. |webber = We don't know how to play this game. |winona = A bit highbrow, don'tcha think? |warly = What is your angle, mon ami? |wortox = A little piece from off the board. |wormwood = Can't play |wurt = Look like... tiny Ironfolk...? |walter = I'm not really interested in board games. |wanda = I have no patience for chess, but it looks simple enough. |choose = maxwell }} The '''Black Bishop''' can be obtained from digging up [[Graves]], picking [[Tumbleweed]]s and hammering [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station]] after the [[Sketch]] of Bishop Figure is unlocked in the world. Giving a Black Bishop to the Pig King will yield four Gold Nuggets and a Sketch for the [[Chess Pieces#Bishop Figure|Bishop Figure]]. When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days. The Black Bishop can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_16". {{Recipe |item = Black Bishop |gold = yes |result = Gold Nugget |resultcount = 4 }} {{Recipe |item = Black Bishop |tool = Antlion |result = Desert Stone }} {{clear}} == [[File:Black Knight.png|48px]] {{Anchor|Black Knight|Black Knight}} == {{Object Infobox |icon = Black Knight.png |image = Black Knight Dropped.png |name = Black Knight |spawnCode = "trinket_31" |droppedBy = {{Pic|32|Ancient Pseudoscience Station Build}}{{Pic|32|Broken Pseudoscience Station Build}}{{Pic|32|Grave}}{{Pic|32|Tumbleweed}} |stack=40}}{{Quotes |wilson = Honestly, he just leaves them out wherever. |willow = Probably the most boring game ever invented. |wolfgang = Junk from braingame! |wendy = I'd rather have the castle... |wx78 = THE ONLY WINNING MOVE IS NOT TO PLAY |wickerbottom = In German it is referred to as the "springer". |woodie = That's the, uh, horse piece. |maxwell = Not a pawn, but still a minion. |wigfrid = Tis nöt a unicörn. |webber = We can't follow the rules if we don't know them. |winona = That's a knight. |warly = It looks all knight to me. |wortox = A little piece from off the board. |wormwood = Little Neigher |wurt = Look like... tiny Ironfolk...? |walter = They're kind of boring once you've seen the bigger version. |wanda = I wonder whatever happened to the rest of the set.
